registered_workflow.name: Stage142 Text Location Guard Shadow Workflow

known_limitations: Regex-based location extraction can miss lower-case, non-English, ambiguous, or complex locations.
The heuristic may confuse location, organization, and person/title spans in harder text.
Stage63 showed a small false-NE tradeoff of +3.
The workflow is not evidence for final-logit integration.

next_stage_recommendation.goal: Run targeted negative-control/adversarial text-location stress tests to measure false-positive risk before any final integration discussion.
recommended_actions: Generate or collect same-location SUPPORT controls with varied surface forms.
Test multi-location evidence where one location matches and another distractor is present.
Test organization/person names that look location-like.
avoid: checkpoint selection based on Stage142 outputs
using intervention_type or gold labels as policy inputs
